introSection: Achterbahn is a steel roller coaster located at Rasti-Land in Salzhemmendorf, Lower Saxony, Germany. Achterbahn is German for Roller Coaster.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Pink track and baby blue supports.

fullText:
Achterbahn is a steel roller coaster located at Rasti-Land in Salzhemmendorf, Lower Saxony, Germany. Achterbahn is German for Roller Coaster.

After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

Pink track and baby blue supports.
